nasb.text: if you will listen to the voice of the Lord your God, keeping all His commandments which I am commanding you today, and doing what is right in the sight of the Lord your God.

esv.text: if you obey the voice of the Lord your God, keeping all his commandments that I am commanding you today, and doing what is right in the sight of the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 只要你聽從耶和華你的　神的話，遵守我今日吩咐你的一切誡命，實行耶和華你的　神看為正的事，就必這樣。”
